information about providers participating in the Kidney Care Choices (KCC) Model.
A related file, the KCC Model Alignment Beneficiary file, contains enrollment data for beneficiaries with chronic kidney disease (CKD) who are aligned to participating providers in the KCC Model.

The KCC Model builds upon the earlier Comprehensive End Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) Care (CEC) Model structure, in which dialysis facilities, nephrologists, and other health care providers form ESRD-focused accountable
